# Migration Report: tender-extraction-lab

Source project (audited): `GOZ` (this folder)
Target clean project: `tender-extraction-lab`

Constraints: **no code changes in the old project; audit only**. This report recommends what to copy and where.

## Categories
- `KEEP_CORE`: useful production / evaluation logic (may still be placed under `legacy/` if not clean).
- `KEEP_TEST_DATA`: inputs/outputs/gold samples/reports used for benchmarking and regression.
- `KEEP_CONFIG`: dependency / run wrappers / environment templates (no secrets).
- `KEEP_DOCS`: documentation, prompts, known failures, architecture notes.
- `DO_NOT_MIGRATE`: caches, bytecode, vendor snapshots, irrelevant artifacts, or easily regenerated outputs.

## Inventory Summary (all files)
- `DO_NOT_MIGRATE`: 7401
- `KEEP_CONFIG`: 4
- `KEEP_CORE`: 44
- `KEEP_DOCS`: 141
- `KEEP_TEST_DATA`: 1117

## Note on Vendored Node Dependencies
- Files under `Архив\\node_dependencies\\node_modules_2026-05-10\\**` are classified as `DO_NOT_MIGRATE` per-file (vendored snapshot).

## Recommended Target Layout (high-level)
- `scripts/`: new lab code (evaluation, batch builders, inventory, candidates, validation).
- `data/gold/`: human-validated gold datasets (versioned).
- `data/raw_samples/`: small curated document samples (prefer outside git if sensitive).
- `data/legacy/`: legacy reports, outputs, and artifacts for traceability.
- `legacy/old_project/`: frozen snapshot of old scripts/prompts for reference-only reading.
